name: DrawingPluginBase
summary: The DrawingPluginBase class is an abstract base class for drawing plug-ins.

methods.name: DefineInput
methods.summary: The method Tekla Structures calls for the plug-in to query the input. The plug-in must then return an array list of input definition instances. The plug-in will be dependent on the items it returns. Dependent means that if any of these items change, for example the user moves the points, the plug-in will be re-run with new input. DefineInput is not called during the re-run, and thus all the actual implementation should be in the Run() method. The Run() method is always called in view coordinates.

returns.doc: An array list of input definition instances. If the plug-in is not dependent on input, it should return an empty array list (not null).

methods.name: IsDefaultValue(Double)
methods.summary: Returns true if the given value is set to the default value for this type.

returns.doc: True if the value is set to the default.

methods.name: IsDefaultValue(Int32)
methods.summary: Returns true if the given value is set to the default value for this type.

returns.doc: True if the value is set to the default.

methods.name: IsDefaultValue(String)
methods.summary: Returns true if the given value is set to the default value (empty string).

returns.doc: True if the value is set to the default.

methods.name: Run
methods.summary: The main method of the plug-in. It is called after the input has been defined with DefineInput(). This is the "main" method of the plug-in and should contain all the actual implementation.

params.name: Input
params.doc: An array list of the same format and order as what was returned from DefineInput().
